title: pfaffia gnaphalioides var. floccosa
intro: Pfaffia gnaphalioides var. floccosa, also known as suma or para-para, is a plant species that belongs to the Amarantaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pfaffia gnaphalioides var. floccosa include its ability to support the immune system, improve digestive health, and reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or capsules and can be used to promote overall well-being and enhance the body's natural healing processes.
